entry.title: New: Bill 13 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
“A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, ESTIMATED REVENUES AND CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS, DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT; MAKAWAO-PUKALANI-KULA COMMUNITY PLAN AREA” The purpose of this bill is to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget relating to the Von Tempsky Kula Property Acquisition.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
